_meta.purpose: Tracks all 75 implementation milestones for the Metis Research Cortex redesign. Statuses: pending | in_progress | completed | skipped. Each completed item records a date and optional notes.

items.subject: Create implementation-progress.json and implementation-log.md
items.notes: implementation-progress.json created. implementation-log.md deferred to M0.2 session.

items.subject: Rename 02_agents/pkm-builder/ → 02_agents/rc-builder/ and update all code references
items.notes: Folder renamed (pkm-builder → rc-builder). agent-registry.json updated (slug, name, invocation, chains_with). MCP server.py, agents.py, projects.py docstrings updated.

items.subject: Remove all 'Monia' references from non-venv files
items.notes: Replaced Monia/monia with Metis/metis across code and doc files. History files updated inline. 07_outputs/reviews/monia/ folder deleted (confirmed by user, Red Line 2).

items.subject: Rename 01_control-room/ → 01_journal/, archive planning docs, flatten memory/
items.notes: Planning docs moved to 09_archive/planning-history/. memory/ flattened to direct children. notes/ and brainstorms/ created.

items.subject: Rename 08_system/prompts/ → 08_system/patterns/
items.notes: Renamed via git mv. Aligns with Section 28 Pattern browser decision.

items.subject: Update CLAUDE.md to reflect new folder structure
items.notes: Updated agent invocation table, key paths section, and PKM→RC references.

items.subject: Audit current 12 tabs and decide which code modules will be merged or removed
items.notes: Explore agent audited all 14 R module files. Consolidation plan confirmed: 5 new modules, 3 unchanged, Dropzone removed.

items.subject: Create new 8-tab structure in app.R (Today · Knowledge · Thinking · Planner · Work · Meetings · Learning · Metis) with stub modules
items.notes: app.R updated. 8 nav_panel entries and 8 server calls. All new modules wired.

items.subject: Move Library + Research + News code into new Knowledge module via navset_card_tab
items.notes: mod_knowledge.R created as wrapper. Calls library_ui/server, research_ui/server, news_ui/server as nested sub-modules.

items.subject: Move Notes + Ideas code into new Thinking module via navset_card_tab
items.notes: mod_thinking.R created as wrapper. Calls notes_ui/server (with parent_session) and ideas_ui/server as nested sub-modules.

items.subject: Keep Planner as standalone tab — existing mod_planning.R unchanged
items.notes: No changes needed. planning_ui/planning_server wired directly in app.R.

items.subject: Move Projects code into new Work module
items.notes: mod_work.R created as renamed copy of mod_projects.R. projects_ui → work_ui, projects_server → work_server. h1 heading updated to 'Work'.

items.subject: Keep Meetings as standalone tab — existing mod_meetings.R unchanged
items.notes: No changes needed.

items.subject: Keep Learning as standalone tab — existing mod_learning.R unchanged
items.notes: Learning was already a top-level tab. No changes needed.

items.subject: Move System tab code into new Metis module
items.notes: mod_metis.R created as renamed copy of mod_system.R. system_ui → metis_tab_ui, system_server → metis_tab_server. h1 updated to 'Metis'.

items.subject: Remove Dropzone from nav_panel — not in 8-tab structure
items.notes: Dropzone removed from app.R nav and server calls. mod_dropzone.R remains on disk pending M1.11 cleanup.

items.subject: Delete old replaced modules: mod_control_room.R, mod_projects.R, mod_system.R, mod_dropzone.R
items.notes: User confirmed deletion. All 4 files removed. Sub-modules (library, research, news, notes, ideas) kept — still used by wrapper modules.

items.subject: Visual audit: confirm each tab loads, fits one screen, has clear hierarchy
items.notes: Needs RStudio launch to verify no R errors and 8 tabs render correctly.

items.subject: Strip Today tab to locked layout: greeting strip, overnight summary, launcher row, focus, scan, token footer
items.notes: mod_today.R fully rewritten. Removed KPI boxes, git panel, snapshot, publications panel, project boards, recent files, task table. New structure: 6 sections.

items.subject: Build six launcher cards with Today-level simplified actions
items.notes: launcher-row grid with 6 buttons: Capture idea, Brainstorm, Work on document, Review code, Prep meeting, Process inbox. Each opens a modal with copy-prompt block or navigation action.

items.subject: Build 'What's new overnight' summary
items.notes: overnight-card shows counts for news items, new papers, new ideas, meetings from last 24h. Shows 'clean slate' message when nothing is new.

items.subject: Build 'Today's focus' card
items.notes: focus_ui shows highest-priority active project with domain badge, priority chip, and next step. Conditional — returns NULL when no active projects.

items.subject: Build 'Scan for changes' button and result area
items.notes: Scan button checks: git dirty/unpushed across active projects, tracked_files with watch=1 changed today, PLANNING.md files updated today. Results shown in scan-section groups.

items.subject: Wire trust badge into navbar header
items.notes: nav_spacer() + nav_item(div.trust-badge) added to page_navbar. Shows green shield + 'Local-first' text. Static for now — session call tracking is Phase 4.

items.subject: Build Ctrl+K / Cmd+K shortcut handler + '+ Capture' navbar button
items.notes: JS keydown listener in app.R header fires global_capture input. nav_item button does the same. Both trigger quick_capture_server module via reactive(input$global_capture).

items.subject: Build capture modal with auto-classification (prefix routing)
items.notes: mod_capture.R: quick_capture_server module. Modal shows prefix hints (i: n: t: q:). parse_capture_prefix() classifies text live. renderUI type badge updates as user types. Prefix is stripped before saving.

items.subject: Wire modal to SQLite via capture_idea schema (same DB as MCP tool)
items.notes: i:/default → insert_idea(). n: → insert_quick_note() (personal_notes). t: → insert_task(). q: → insert_idea(idea_type='question'). auto_tags() mirrors MCP tool tag extraction. Also fixed schema bug in mod_today.R quick-capture (was using wrong column names).

items.subject: Design session_events and session_context schemas
Implement session bootstrap stage
Implement Data Guardian intercept stage
Implement Cybersecurity intercept stage
Implement intent parsing stage
Implement token budget allocation stage
Implement surgical context assembly stage
Implement execution with incremental save stage
Implement output red-line post-check
Implement logging stage
Implement self-improvement capture stage
Wire all stages together and run end-to-end pipeline tests
Install sqlite-vec and set up vector tables
items.notes: sqlite-vec 0.1.9 installed in venv. vec_episodic, vec_semantic, vec_procedural virtual tables defined in vector_memory.py DDL.

items.subject: Install sentence-transformers and pick embedding model
items.notes: Using fastembed 0.8.0 (ONNX, no PyTorch needed) instead of sentence-transformers. Model: BAAI/bge-small-en-v1.5, 384 dims. embeddings.py provides lazy-loaded embed()/embed_one(). Model downloads to ~/.cache/fastembed on first use.

items.subject: Implement episodic memory layer
items.notes: store_episodic_memory() MCP tool. Table: episodic_memory + vec_episodic virtual table. Stores events with type (idea/note/task/paper/meeting/agent_run), content, metadata, session_id.

items.subject: Implement semantic memory graph
items.notes: store_semantic_memory() MCP tool. Table: semantic_memory + vec_semantic. Stores concept/definition nodes with related_concepts and source linkage.

items.subject: Implement procedural memory tracker
items.notes: store_procedural_memory() MCP tool. Table: procedural_memory + vec_procedural. Stores workflow patterns with trigger_context and step-by-step instructions.

items.subject: Implement working memory
items.notes: set_working_memory() + get_working_memory() MCP tools. Table: working_memory. Per-session key/value scratchpad for mid-pipeline state.

items.subject: Implement reflexive memory
items.notes: Handled by write_reflexion() in self_improvement.py (Phase 4). reflexion_log table captures agent self-critiques. No separate implementation needed.

items.subject: Build retrieval pipeline with RRF fusion and reranking
items.notes: semantic_search() MCP tool. Vector similarity (sqlite-vec KNN) + keyword LIKE fused via RRF (k=60). Searches episodic, semantic, and procedural layers. Returns top_k ranked results.

items.subject: Build retrieval debugger UI in Metis → Memory
items.notes: Needs R Shiny tab in mod_metis.R to call semantic_search() and display layered results. Defer to after MCP tools are confirmed working.

items.notes: 00_inbox→inbox, 01_journal→journal, 02_agents→agents, 04_projects→projects, 05_sources→inputs, 09_archive→archive. 457 files committed with full rename tracking.

items.subject: Move 07_outputs/apps/metis-dashboard/ → system/app/
items.notes: R Shiny app now lives in system/app/. History preserved via git rename detection.

items.subject: Move 08_system/mcp-server/ → system/mcp-server/
items.notes: MCP server moved. run.sh updated to point to new path.

items.subject: Move 08_system/ remaining config → system/config/
items.notes: agent-registry.json, implementation-progress.json, user-config.yaml, thinking-profile.yaml, red-lines.md, security/, workflows/, ontology/, templates/, logs/ all moved. Strategy docs moved to archive/.

items.subject: Merge 06_library/ + 03_domains/ → knowledge/
items.notes: knowledge/library/ (concepts, disease-areas, methods, people-organizations, reading-lists, glossary.md), knowledge/courses/, knowledge/domains/.

items.subject: Update CLAUDE.md path references throughout
items.notes: Updated App path, Agents path, Key paths section, routing table, output conventions, software stack. Added new agents to routing.

items.subject: Update run.sh and verify MCP server still starts
items.notes: run.sh MCP_DIR updated. config.py Paths class updated with all new paths. cache_helpers.py, config_tools.py, self_improvement.py, thinking_profile.py, images.py all updated. agent-registry.json paths updated.

items.subject: Verify R Shiny dashboard still launches (transition period)
items.notes: Manual verification needed — launch system/app/launch.R and confirm 8 tabs render.

items.subject: FastAPI scaffold — system/app-py/, deps, base layout + nav
items.notes: main.py, db.py, launch.py, run.sh, requirements.txt. 9 routers. Bootstrap 5 + HTMX navbar with 8 tabs, trust badge, capture button. CSS copied from R app unchanged.

items.subject: DB layer — port db_table(), metis_paths(), schema helpers to Python
items.notes: db.py: get_db_path() (METIS_RC_ROOT env var aware), db_query(), db_scalar(), db_execute(). Graceful fallbacks for missing tables.

items.subject: Today tab — daily summary, trust badge, session count
items.notes: Greeting strip, 6 launcher cards, overnight summary, today's focus, scan for changes (git status), token footer. All HTMX partials.

items.subject: Knowledge tab — cards, search, add/edit
Meetings + Learning + Work tabs — tables, details, progress
Thinking tab — notes, connections
Planner tab — kanban, Gantt (Plotly), focus board
Metis tab — agent runs, config panel
Quick-capture — Ctrl+K modal, capture endpoint
items.notes: routers/capture.py: GET /api/capture-modal, POST /api/capture with i:/n:/t:/q: prefix routing. app.js: Ctrl+K shortcut, live type badge.

items.subject: DB watcher — poll for MCP updates, reload notification
items.notes: GET /api/check-db-mtime endpoint. app.js polls every 20s, shows Bootstrap alert with 'Reload now' link when mtime changes.

items.subject: PyInstaller bundle — single .exe (Windows), .app (Mac)
Installer script — Inno Setup (Windows) + shell script (Mac)

items.notes: RETIRED.md added to agents/dashboard-engineer/, agents/ux-engineer/, agents/edu-expert/. Capabilities absorbed by new agents.

items.notes: agents/frontend-designer-builder/: system-prompt.md (design-shotgun, 9 commands, 3 dials, anti-patterns), contract.md, skill.md.

items.subject: Design Auditor — system prompt + reverse-engineering workflow
items.notes: agents/design-auditor/: 7 scored dimensions, anti-pattern library with severity ratings, 9-step workflow.

items.subject: Visualization Maker — system prompt + fireworks-tech-graph integration
items.notes: agents/visualization-maker/: 14 diagram types, 7 visual styles, semantic shape vocabulary (hexagon=agent, cylinder=vector store, etc.), legend rule.

items.notes: agents/content-harvester/: 7 source types, 12-field metadata schema, 3 output formats, routing rules table.

items.subject: Learning Architect — system prompt + edu theory + Content Harvester workflow
items.notes: agents/learning-architect/: Bloom's taxonomy, 5-interval spaced repetition, ADDIE/backward design, course JSON schema, knowledge/courses/ structure.

items.notes: Run: npx skills add <repo> for each after M5.5 is complete.

items.notes: CLAUDE.md updated: frontend-designer, design-auditor, visualization-maker, content-harvester, learning-architect added. Routing table updated.
